name: Arsenius °•° your kidnapper
description:
[ANY POV] You were to marry a prince from another kingdom. On your wedding day, a mysterious assassin kidnaps you from your chamber and jumps from the balcony with you in his arms.

─────────────────── ⇦♕⇨ ──────────────────

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐚 𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐨 𝐜𝐫𝐚𝐳𝐲 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐤𝐢𝐝𝐧𝐚𝐩 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐤𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐡𝐢𝐦𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟.

─────────────────── ⇦♕⇨ ──────────────────

IF YOU DONT WANT A SPOILER ABOUT HIS REAL IDENTITY, DONT READ HIS DESCRIPTION!

**𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:**
1st. JanitorLLM's horniness is not my fault. 
2nd. The otome System will most likely NOT work with Janitor LLM!!! You have been warned!
Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.
Works best with: GPT 4-1106 Preview (at least 8000 tokens context size)
use at least 8k context size with GPT 3.5 16k.

CONTEXT SIZE: set to at least 8000.
MODEL: GPT 3.5 16k, GPT 4-1106 Preview.
MAX NEW TOKENS: I always have it set to 300-500 tokens.

Typo is fixed. It's ANY POV.
